request.description:
This endpoint can be used to fetch time series data based on a series of query parameters.

The _dataSamplingMode_ parameter can take three different values, specifying details on how to fetch data:

1. _linear-interpolation:_ Get interpolated samples from the data archive, based on the start  
    time, end time and interpolation interval specified.
    
2. _raw:_ Get the raw data samples as they are stored in the data archive,  
    specified by start and end time.
    
3. _raw-values-by-count:_ Get the number of raw values specified by _numberOfRawValues_  
    with a timestamp older than _startTime_. If neither _numberOfRawValues_  
    nor _startTime_ is specified, this method will return the most recent  
    value. Example: _numberOfRawValues_ = 5, _startTime_ = current time:  
    will get the 5 most recent samples.
    

BODY:

{

"startTime": \[datetime\],

"endTime": \[datetime\],    
"interpolationInterval": {

      "days": int,

      "hours": int,

      "minutes": int,

      "seconds": int,

      "milliseconds": int

    },

"dataSamplingMode": "linear-interpolation" | "raw" | "raw-values-by-count",    
"numberOfRawValuesByCount": int,

"tagList": string\[\]

}
